data_sources: Excel file analysis for job types and abilities
dotgg.gg tier lists for overall rankings
Community meta analysis for role tiers

characters.name: Lynette
characters.notes: Top priority U10 - Best buffer for EN. Key abilities: Triple buff system (active/passive/ultimate), Fire elemental damage

characters.name: Primrose EX
characters.notes: Better than Lynette ult + excellent A4. Key abilities: Complete buffer and debuffer kit, Attack and elemental attack debuffs

characters.name: Solon
characters.notes: Doubles unit potency - pairs with Odio-O. Key abilities: Double ultimate usage, Unit potency doubling
keySkills: P.Atk, E.Def, Polearm, Fire Res reduction

characters.name: Signa
characters.notes: Queen of debuff - 20% all stats down. Key abilities: 20% all stats debuff, Queen of debuff abilities

characters.name: Gilderoy
characters.notes: Strong U10, weak A4 - shard after U10. Key abilities: Great tank capabilities, Lightning sword attacks

characters.name: Ophilia
characters.notes: Good healer U10, weak A4. Key abilities: Dedicated healer, Light elemental support
